titleStmt.title: SII 7.405: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 405. (A.R. No. 195 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉnavar cāyaluṟṟi ḻitara tikkaṉaittum taṉ cakkara naṭātti virasiṁ hāsa ṉattu
Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kovirājakecarivarmmarā nacakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḷade vaṟkku yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu
nāṭṭu śrīkulottuṅkacoḻaccaru(r)ppetimaṅkalattut tiruvaṉan=tiśvara muṭaiya ma hāde vaṟkku Ivvūrirun tu vāḻum veḷḷāṭṭi Ulakuṭaiyāḷ celvi vaitta san=ti viḷakku Onṟu
Onṟukkum viṭṭa Āṭu paṉniraṇṭu Ippaṉṉiraṇṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Āṭṭup panṉirunāḻi ney niṉṟānāle candrā tittavar Aḷakkakaṭaven tāḻi nāmayaneṉThe following two lines are engraved in continuation of this inscription. Though they are written in a similar hand they seem to have no connexion with it. 1 m mahāsabhai yom aṭṭāmpuṟattu urudra kumārapaṭṭa soma yājiyār paṇiyālum irācca[ḷū]r civade vapaṭṭanum irāyūr cirāmapaṭṭa atirāttra yājiyār paṇiyālum māṭapoca uru- dranā r[ā*]yaṇapaṭṭasoma yājiyār paṇiyālum ippaṭikku aṭṭāmpuṟattu śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭan eḻuttu i[p*]paṭikku irāccaḷūr [ṛ*]ṣabha vāhanabha ṭṭan eḻuttu 2 ivai irāccaḷūr tillaināyakapaṭṭan eḻuttu—ivai kāṭ(ṭ)ṭukkuṟi veṇṇaiya krama vittan eḻuttu—ivai surasārambi śrīkṛṣṇakrama vittan eḻuttu ittaṉmañ ceyvittāṉ viḷattūrkiḻavaṉ•••• ivvūrk kaṇakkaṉ kumāracatti tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān eḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 7.405 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
